title: Remove max-height in widgets and columns in Item cards in order to prevent scroll within scroll within scroll

posts.author: Filurisen (Therese)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

When using several “Long text” Widgets in Item cards there´s scroll, within scroll, within scroll. Here´s an example:

  • When adding widgets the Item cards gets a scrollbar (no issues here)
  • When adding a text widgets including several columns, this widget will get a scrollbar when the columns reach a certain height (the issue starts here)
  • A column (in this case “Long text”) are set to a maximum height and when adding more information in the column than this you get a scrollbar.

At this level, that we work within our annual plans we have scrolls, within scrolls, within scrolls and this is not very user friendly. Also very annoying. Our wish here would be to remove the max-height of both the widgets and the columns.

Kind regards,
Therese
